Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Hardware hotplug events on Linux, the gory details 99 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. A ternary plot of citrus geneology 59 upvotes, 3 comments
  3. Optimizing Recommendation Systems with JDK's Vector API 58 upvotes, 3 comments
  4. OpenTitan Shipping in Production 66 upvotes, 7 comments
  5. Converting dash cam videos into Panoramax images 23 upvotes, 1 comments
  6. Let's Get Physical 84 upvotes, 14 comments
  7. A GitHub Issue Title Compromised 4k Developer Machines 288 upvotes, 67 comments
  8. Show HN: Jido 2.0, Elixir Agent Framework 225 upvotes, 51 comments
  9. Poor Man's Polaroid 194 upvotes, 48 comments
  10. GLiNER2: Unified Schema-Based Information Extraction 27 upvotes, 3 comments
  11. Wikipedia was in read-only mode following mass admin account compromise 842 upvotes, 277 comments
  12. Datasets for Reconstructing Visual Perception from Brain Data 43 upvotes, 8 comments
  13. Labor Market Impacts of AI 15 upvotes, 1 comments
  14. Fast-Servers 97 upvotes, 28 comments
  15. World-first gigabit laser link between aircraft and geostationary satellite 160 upvotes, 60 comments
  16. 10% of Firefox crashes are caused by bitflips 160 upvotes, 63 comments
  17. Greg Kroah-Hartman Stretches Support Periods for Key Linux LTS Kernels 57 upvotes, 19 comments
  18. Proton Mail Helped FBI Unmask Anonymous 'Stop Cop City' Protester 119 upvotes, 52 comments
  19. Good software knows when to stop 310 upvotes, 171 comments
  20. A man who broke into jail 99 upvotes, 48 comments
  21. A standard protocol to handle and discard low-effort, AI-Generated pull requests 11 upvotes, 2 comments
  22. A rabbit hole in 5 commits 5 upvotes, 0 comments
  23. Show HN: PageAgent, A GUI agent that lives inside your web app 64 upvotes, 35 comments
  24. CBP tapped into the online advertising ecosystem to track peoples’ movements 100 upvotes, 68 comments
  25. Remotely unlocking an encrypted hard disk 62 upvotes, 39 comments
  26. GPT-5.4 543 upvotes, 488 comments
  27. The Brand Age 177 upvotes, 161 comments
  28. Show HN: SitDeck – Customizable live dashboard of news, markets, threats 6 upvotes, 2 comments
  29. Launch HN: Vela (YC W26) – AI for complex scheduling 33 upvotes, 36 comments
  30. Structured AI (YC F25) Is Hiring 0 upvotes, 0 comments

Last generated 7:30am, 6 March 2026. Source here.
